page_content: Title AOSC375 Introduction to the Blue Ocean or GEOL375 Introduction to the Blue Ocean ENSP342 Environmental Threats to Oceans and Coasts: Towards an Integrated Policy Response GEOG441 The Coastal Ocean ENST450 Wetland Ecology GEOG272 Introduction to Earth Observation Science GEOG373 Geographic Information Systems ENSP386 Internship Restricted Electives--Choose 5 courses. At least 2 courses must be from Area 1, and at least 1 course must be from Area 2: 1 Credits 12 6 6 15
